The '''Feriae system''', also known as the '''Junction system''', was a four-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]] that contained the planet of [[Feriae Junction/Legends|Feriae Junction]]. It was located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Thesme sector/Legends|Thesme sector]]. Approach to the system from the direction of the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] was complicated by the [[Feswe Corridor|Asteroid Corridor]].
